anomalies.message: Solutions Markdown section '二' contains both choice questions (1-5) and solution section '三' content (1-3) without a separate heading. Handled by structure repair — content was deterministically split to Q6-Q10 and Q11-Q13.
Paper Markdown stem for Q19 contains OCR noise: '\pmb {\text {又 向 量}}' where '\pmb{\beta}' would be cleaner. Cosmetic only, no mathematical impact. Source: papers/1992年考研数学(一)真题.md line 111.
